title: Danny
subTitle: When a policewoman is tasked with solving a puzzling murder case, she teams up with Danny, a highly trained dog. Their investigation soon leads them on a hunt for a sinister group of serial killers.

title: Free Ticket
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of songs and snippets from some of the most popular and trending Tamil movies is played to entertain the audience.

title: Rekka
subTitle: After preventing a gangster, David, from marrying a girl against her wishes, Shiva's life is complicated by a kidnapping.

title: Game Changer
subTitle: In the midst of a power struggle for the chief minister's post, an upstanding IPS officer enters the fray of politics to fight against its corrupt system.

title: Inji Iduppazhagi
subTitle: An ardent foodie who is overweight decides to join a slimming centre to attract the boy she loves. But she decides to expose the unhealthy practices the management uses to speed up weight loss.

title: Thirunaal
subTitle: Blade, a henchman for a local gangster, Naaga, falls in love with Vidhya, the daughter of a factory owner. He has to choose between supporting her father and his boss, who are rivals.

title: Balloon
subTitle: Jeevanand rents an old house in Ooty with his wife and nephew hoping to find inspiration to write a script. However, strange events begin unfolding in the house which are linked to his past.

title: Thondan
subTitle: Narayanan, a politician's spoilt son, seeks revenge from Vishnu, a kindhearted driver, after Narayanan's brother dies in his ambulance.

title: Sethupathi
subTitle: Sethupathi, a tough police officer, investigates the murder of an inspector. His findings lead to the arrest of Vathiyar, an influential man in Madurai, but put his life, career and family at risk.

title: Dora
subTitle: A father and daughter purchase an old run-down vintage car. However, unbeknownst to them, the car is possessed by a dangerous revenge-seeking spirit.

title: Sir
subTitle: Amid efforts from bigots to limit schooling, a young teacher joins his father in their family legacy to continue ensuring equal education for all.

title: Mannar Vagaiyara
subTitle: When a man helps his brother with his relationship troubles, he unknowingly attracts trouble into both their lives.

title: Gorilla
subTitle: Four friends join hands to rob a bank with a chimpanzee as their accomplice. However, things do not go the way they planned.

title: Vetrivel
subTitle: Vetrivel strives to get his brother married to his lover, despite their father's opposition. However, complications arise when they attempt to kidnap the girl.

title: Mapla Singam
subTitle: Amidst the rivalry of two castes in a village, a leader's daughter falls in love with a boy from the rival caste. Things take a turn when her cousin Anbu falls in love with the boy's sister.

title: Goli Soda
subTitle: Striving to make a name for themselves, four teenagers open a restaurant in a busy market. However, their venture faces unforeseen challenges as they clash with the local leader's cousin.

title: Bhajarangi 2
subTitle: An evil drug baron named Araka kidnaps innocent villagers and forces them to produce drugs for him. Fortunately, a forest officer learns of this and decides to put a stop to it.

title: Kabadadaari
subTitle: Shakti, a traffic policeman, is bored of his monotonous routine but his life takes a turn when he finds the remains of a family. Upon investigating further, he discovers unusual truths.

title: Kaalidas
subTitle: Honest policeman Kaalidas is tasked with investigating a series of apparent suicides, but it puts a strain on his marriage with Vidyaa, who soon seeks solace in their new tenant.

title: Kingston
subTitle: In 1982, the coastal region of Thoovathor becomes cursed by a mysterious paranormal event. To break the curse, Kingston, a sea smuggler, ventures into the sea's waters.

title: Ambikapathy
subTitle: The son of a Hindu pundit discovers that his childhood sweetheart loves a city-bred man and wants to marry him. However, he persistently seeks to win her heart.

title: Kuttram 23
subTitle: ACP Vetrimaaran, a dedicated cop posted in Chennai, investigates a missing woman and the murder of a Church priest. As he delves deeper, he uncovers a larger crime syndicate involving medical professionals.

title: Yaman
subTitle: A young man decides to enter the world of politics to avenge the death of his father, who lost his life due to a bunch of scheming politicians.

title: Kennedy Club
subTitle: Muruganandham, a former kabaddi player, strives to coach his women's kabaddi team to make them win the national championship.

title: Yaanai
subTitle: Ravi, the youngest son of an influential family accused of causing a man's death, takes charge of defending them. However, amidst the turmoil, he unexpectedly falls for a woman.

title: Varappogum 24 Manikkul
subTitle: Vidya narrates the story behind her husband's mysterious death to three criminals. Later, when the criminals reveal their stories, the four of them devise a plan to take revenge.
